creator: yzhong@freebsdfoundation.org
text:
On the page listing all mailing lists (https://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo), if I click on the 'freebsd-sysinstall' list, I get taken to https://lists.freebsd.org/subscription/freebsd-sysinatall. 

The 'sysinatall' typo propagates to all the links and emails on this page, so none of them work.
